calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Court Supervision Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Morris Bobrow for Calvin Block.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to why termination of Court supervision of the Trust should be granted. The Petition to Terminate Court Superversion of Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
